title: Mining and quarry workers and related operatives
description: Perform a variety of attending duties at amusement or recreation facility. May schedule use of recreation facilities, maintain and provide equipment to participants of sporting events or recreational pursuits, or operate amusement concessions and rides. Directly supervise and coordinate activities of construction or extraction workers. Direct work crews installing residential or commercial solar photovoltaic or thermal systems. (Based on 52 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Prepare reports of services rendered, tools used, and time required for billing purposes.
Guide and supervise drilling and extraction crew members, ensuring safe and effective operations during drilling processes and in the maintenance of equipment.
Monitor equipment operations during extraction processes to detect any problems and perform maintenance where necessary.
Maintain and adjust drilling equipment and perform routine maintenance on vehicles used in extraction activities.
Load and unload materials related to drilling and extraction, including using hand tools and powered equipment as required.
Set up and adjust equipment for excavation and ensure proper functioning during extraction operations, including cleaning and preparing work sites.
Organize materials for extraction activities and provide assistance to drilling crews as needed.
Inspect and maintain tools and equipment, ensuring they are in good working order for safe operations.
Observe and monitor equipment performance and maintain logs of service or repair statuses as necessary.
Remove debris and clean work areas after maintenance and extraction activities.
Perform safety checks on equipment before operating and conduct methane gas checks to ensure breathing quality of air.
Inspect loads to ensure that cargo is secure and check all load-related documentation for completeness and accuracy.
Drive trucks to weigh stations before and after loading and along routes in compliance with state regulations, and drive trucks to transport explosives and blasting equipment to blasting sites.
Operate mining machines to gather coal and convey it to floors or shuttle cars, and operate controls to stabilize machines and position and align drills.
Drill bolt holes into roofs at specified distances from ribs or adjacent bolts and select and attach drill bits and drill rods, adding more rods as hole depths increase.
Remove pieces of stone from larger masses using jackhammers, wedges, and other tools; insert wedges and feathers into holes, and drive wedges with sledgehammers to split stone sections from masses.
Perform routine maintenance and upgrade work on machines and equipment, such as replacing parts, building up drill bits, and lubricating machinery.
Document geological formations encountered during work and verify depths and alignments of boring positions.
Move controls to start and regulate the movement of conveyors and to start and position drill cutters or torches.
Establish and oversee the work of construction or extraction workers, ensuring work is performed safely and efficiently.

Set up, operate, or tend machines that cut or slice materials like glass, stone, rubber, or food; examine, measure, and weigh them to verify conformance to specifications; feed stock into cutting machines or conveyors; clean and lubricate equipment, such as cutting machines and conveyors; and monitor operations to ensure safe and efficient functioning.
Direct other workers on cutting teams and engage in supervising activities during construction or extraction projects.
Move materials and supplies using hand tools or machines, such as hoists, winches, or moving equipment; this includes handling high voltage sources and hanging electrical cables as needed.
Observe and record operational data, such as production logs and maintenance records, while also inspecting equipment for defects and wear.
Perform equipment safety checks, maintain records, and clean work areas to ensure a safe work environment.

Inspect and adjust machinery and materials to meet production specifications, including operating controls to move or discharge metal workpieces from furnaces and ensuring materials are loaded according to requirements.
Prepare accident reports and ensure compliance with safety procedures and equipment use by explaining and demonstrating them as necessary.
Observe equipment gauges, signal other workers while loading or unloading materials, and maintain operations in accordance with established safety standards.
Perform maintenance duties such as cleaning, lubricating, and adjusting machinery or equipment, and conducting minor repairs.
Become familiar with digging plans, machine capabilities and limitations, and efficient and safe digging procedures in a given application.
Operate machinery to perform activities such as backfilling excavations, vibrating or breaking rock or concrete, or making winter roads.

Load machines with objects to be processed and unload them after cleaning, placing them on conveyors or racks; adjust, clean, and lubricate mechanical parts of machines, using hand tools and grease guns.
Examine and inspect machines to detect malfunctions, and observe operation of equipment to ensure continuity of flow, safety, and efficient operation, and detect malfunctions.

Set controls to regulate temperature and length of cycles, and start conveyors, pumps, agitators, and machines; observe machine operations, gauges, or thermometers, and adjust controls to maintain specified conditions.
Drill holes, weigh or measure materials, and add specified amounts of chemicals or cleaning solutions at required times to maintain solution levels and concentrations.
Operate or tend machines to wash and remove impurities from items such as coal, plastic, or other materials, and monitor and record processing data.
Collect samples of materials or products for testing, perform routine laboratory tests or analyses to assess quality, and test solutions for conformance to specifications.
Inspect biofuels plant or processing equipment regularly, recording or reporting damage and performing repairs or maintenance as required.
Repair, rebuild, or replace mechanical components of machines and equipment, using hand tools and machinery, and perform routine maintenance on mechanical, electrical, or electronic equipment.
Troubleshoot equipment, electrical components, hydraulics, or other mechanical systems, and diagnose faults or malfunctions to determine required repairs.
Perform routine maintenance on wind turbine equipment, inspect and test controls or electrical systems for compliance, and schedule maintenance for industrial machines and equipment.
Assemble and install machines and equipment, including aligning and bolting parts, using hand tools and power tools.
Read work orders and specifications to determine machines and equipment requiring repair or maintenance, and maintain tool and spare parts inventories required for repair services.
Dismantle and reassemble heavy equipment, including using hoists and hand tools for repairs, and inspect and repair components such as bearings and seals.
Direct and train workers who are assembling or disassembling equipment or cleaning parts, ensuring they understand the tasks and safety protocols.
Maintain clean work areas and comply with safety regulations across all onsite operations.

Perform skilled repair or maintenance operations, using equipment such as hand or power tools, hydraulic presses or shears, and welding equipment. This includes tasks such as disassembling machinery, repairing or replacing defective parts, and reassembling units after repair. Inspect and test completed work and malfunctioning equipment to ensure proper operation, and document repairs made and parts used.

Conduct scheduled maintenance, inspect machinery and components, and clean units and machine parts using appropriate tools and techniques. Maintain inventories and requisition supplies as necessary to ensure efficient operations and minimal downtime.

Coordinate and supervise construction or extraction activities, including the scheduling and training of workers, ensuring safety standards are met. Collaborate with other personnel to solve operational issues and optimize work processes.

Provide technical assistance and direct workers in the installation and maintenance of solar energy systems, ensuring compliance with safety standards and project specifications. Evaluate sites for solar installations and manage project proposals, estimates, and schedules.

Use machines and equipment to perform tasks such as welding, grinding, and fabricating components from various materials, ensuring quality standards are met. Adjust and correct machine setups to achieve specified product dimensions and shapes.

Analyze test results and machine error messages to diagnose problems and recommend solutions. Record production and operational data and overall machine maintenance information for evaluation and compliance purposes.

Collect worn parts and refuse while keeping work areas clean to maintain safety and efficiency. Inspect equipment and perform minor maintenance tasks as required to prevent issues or ensure safe operations.

Clearly communicate information regarding machinery operation, equipment maintenance, and safety procedures to new workers and team members to ensure compliance and effective training within the workplace.

Record attendance, sales, and repair activities accurately to provide detailed operational support and reporting. Collect and verify necessary documents before admitting patrons to facilities in recreational contexts.

Operate amusement concessions or installations and oversee patrons’ use of these facilities to ensure a safe and enjoyable experience. Monitor activities and assist where necessary, following adherence to established rules and evacuation procedures.

Evaluate and inspect the performance of machinery, ensuring operational efficiency through adjustments and repairs. Conduct immediate damage assessments and implement necessary corrective actions as needed.

Engage in the set-up, operation, and monitoring of machinery used in manufacturing and processing, including recording production schedules and ensuring production standards are consistently achieved.
Follow safety protocols such as emergency evacuation procedures and ensure compliance with all safety regulations while operating machinery or overseeing construction and extraction projects.
Remove materials from machines or equipment and properly dispose of or recycle waste as necessary to maintain workplace standards and comply with environmental regulations.
Compile operational or personnel records, such as time and production records, inventory data, repair or maintenance statistics, or test results.
Recommend or initiate personnel actions, such as hires, promotions, transfers, discharges, or disciplinary measures.

Confer with personnel, such as management, engineering, quality control, customer, or union workers' representatives, to coordinate work activities, resolve employee grievances, or identify and review resource needs.
Investigate accidents or injuries and prepare reports of findings; prepare, compile, and submit reports on work activities, operations, production, or work-related accidents.

Conduct or arrange for worker training in safety, repair, or maintenance techniques, operational procedures, or equipment use; explain and demonstrate work tasks to new workers or assign training tasks to experienced workers.

Interpret specifications, blueprints, or job orders to construct templates and lay out reference points for workers; review orders, production schedules, blueprints, or shipping or receiving notices to determine work sequences and material shipping dates, types, volumes, or destinations.
Compute estimates and actual costs of factors such as materials, labor, or outside contractors; compute or estimate cash, payroll, transportation, personnel, or storage requirements.

Requisition materials and supplies, such as tools, equipment, or replacement parts; requisition needed personnel, supplies, equipment, parts, or repair services; requisition necessary supplies, equipment, or services.

Examine objects, systems, or facilities and analyze information to determine needed installations, services, or repairs; inspect or test materials, stock, vehicles, equipment, or facilities to ensure that they are safe, free of defects, and consistent with specifications; inspect work areas or operating equipment to ensure conformance to established standards in areas such as cleanliness or maintenance.

Determine schedules, sequences, and assignments for work activities, based on work priority, quantity of equipment, and skill of personnel; plan work assignments and equipment allocations to meet transportation, operations or production goals; plan and establish schedules.

Enforce safety rules and regulations; inspect and monitor work areas, examine tools and equipment, and provide employee safety training to prevent, detect, and correct unsafe conditions or violations of procedures and safety rules.

Monitor tool and part inventories and the condition and maintenance of shops to ensure adequate working conditions; monitor field work to ensure proper performance and use of materials; observe and evaluate workers' appearance and performance to ensure quality service and compliance with specifications.
Resolve worker problems or collaborate with employees to assist in problem resolution; counsel employees about work-related issues and assist employees to correct job-skill deficiencies.
Drive vehicles or operate machines or equipment to complete work assignments or to assist workers; dispatch personnel and vehicles in response to telephone or radio reports of emergencies.
